surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px border-zinc-200, no shadow by default, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid background with a hard bottom border (border-zinc-200)
surfaces_and_micro_themes.invoice_preview: White background, blue-600 accents for headers and totals, structured table with border-b border-zinc-200, clean and professional.

components.forms: Shadcn UI Input, Select, Checkbox. Use explicit labels. Data-testid on all inputs.
components.tables: Shadcn UI Table. Use for Invoice List and Line Items. Hover states on rows.
components.charts: Shadcn charts (recharts) for Dashboard growth and revenue.
components.buttons: Shadcn UI Button. Primary buttons use blue-600. Add hover state explicitly.

login.layout: Split screen or centered card. Use the abstract blue texture image on one side if split, or as subtle background.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation. Top metrics cards (Total Revenue, Bill Count, etc) using Control Room Grid. Charts below. Recent bills table.
dashboard.features: Growth charts (day/week/month/year toggle), Top customers list.

create_bill.layout: Two-column bento layout. Left/Main: Form for customer details and dynamic line items table. Right/Sidebar: Invoice totals, tax, and actions.
create_bill.features: Auto-calculation of line item amount (qty * rate). Auto-sum of subtotal, tax calculation, grand total. Save and Print/Share buttons.

bills_list.layout: Full width table with filters at the top.
bills_list.features: Search by customer name/phone, date range picker, invoice number.

bill_detail_preview.layout: A4 proportioned white card centered on gray background.
bill_detail_preview.features: Matches 'Blue And White Simple' reference. Print functionality (window.print), Share via WhatsApp link (wa.me).

login_background.description: Abstract blue background with wavy lines, use for login page aesthetic.

empty_state_illustration.description: Calculator on papers, use for empty state in bills list.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit and Manrope.
Implement the Layout shell with a fixed Sidebar and a top header containing the user profile/logout.
For the 'Create Bill' form, build a dynamic table where users can add/remove rows. Use React Hook Form or similar for state management.
Implement automatic calculations: row.amount = row.qty * row.rate; subtotal = sum(row.amount); grandTotal = subtotal + (subtotal * gst / 100).
For the Invoice Preview, create a separate print-only stylesheet or use window.print() hiding everything except the invoice container. Use the reference blue accent.
For the WhatsApp share, construct the URL: https://wa.me/{phone}?text={encoded_message}.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. e.g. data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='add-line-item-button'.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively but customize the border-radius to max 8px and use the defined blue primary color.
Make sure files have a .js/.jsx extension (no .tsx).
